HTML5 arcade

Neon Lane Dash

Score 0
Combo x1
Time 45
Shield 1
Best 0

Dash lane

Center

Switch lanes, collect sparks, avoid blockers. Keyboard: A/D or arrow keys. Touch: tap left or right. Focus slows the road for a moment.

Zero-domain monetization test Standalone hosting keeps ads disabled; platform builds use SDK-safe ads only at natural breaks.
Submission kit

Neon lane ready

Collect sparks, dodge blockers, and keep the dash alive for a short arcade run.
